project_name.description: Project name (package name and bundle name)
project_name.pattern_match_failure_message: Lowercase, starts with letter, a-z/0-9/underscore, min 3 chars.

deployment_model.description: What deployment model do you want?

success_message:
Project '{{.project_name}}' created.

Next steps:
  cd {{.project_name}}
  uv sync --group dev
  uv run pytest tests/

Full documentation: root README.md in the template repo you used with bundle init.
